title: AN ACT TO AMEND PRIORITY NUMBERS 7 AND 13, PAGE 58-B, GROUP III FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, APPENDIX B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1729 / 57 OG No. 15, 2651 (April 10, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2922, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND PRIORITY NUMBERS 7 AND 13, PAGE 58-B, GROUP III FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, APPENDIX B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Priority numbers 7 and 13, page 58-B, Group HI for the Province of Leyte, Appendix B of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen are hereby amended to read as follows:

"7

Malitbog

Maningning

ConstructionCommunityschool building

4,000.00

"13

Malitbog

Sta. Cruz

Construction of shop building

4,000.00

â

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
